import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; // Sample data for high-protein recipes with full nutrition, sorted by protein const highProteinRecipes = [ { name: 'Chicken Curry', description: 'A classic Indian chicken curry with a rich, flavorful tomato-onion gravy.', protein: 30, carbs: 10, fats: 20, calories: 340, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/84994F/FFFFFF?text=Chicken+Curry', }, { name: 'Soya Chunks Curry', description: 'A hearty curry made with soya chunks, an excellent plant-based protein source.', protein: 25, carbs: 15, fats: 15, calories: 300, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/B45253/FFE797?text=Soya+Curry', }, { name: 'Paneer Bhurji', description: 'Scrambled Indian cottage cheese with onions, tomatoes, and spices.', protein: 20, carbs: 8, fats: 18, calories: 250, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/FCB53B/84994F?text=Paneer+Bhurji', }, { name: 'Masoor Dal Tadka', description: 'Classic Indian red lentil soup tempered with aromatic spices for daily protein.', protein: 18, carbs: 35, fats: 6, calories: 220, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/FFE797/84994F?text=Masoor+Dal', }, { name: 'Sprouts Salad', description: 'A refreshing salad with mixed sprouts, chopped veggies, and a lemon dressing.', protein: 15, carbs: 25, fats: 5, calories: 180, img: 'https://placehold.co/600x400/84994F/FFFFFF?text=Sprouts+Salad', }, ]; const HomePage = () => { const [weight, setWeight] = useState(''); const [unit, setUnit] = useState('kg'); const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState(null); const [activeCard, setActiveCard] = useState(null); // State to track the active card const handleCardClick = (index) => { // If the same card is clicked, close it. Otherwise, open the new one. setActiveCard(activeCard === index ? null : index); }; const handleCalculate = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const weightInKg = unit === 'lbs' ? weight / 2.20462 : parseFloat(weight); if (weightInKg > 0) { const protein = (weightInKg * 1.6).toFixed(0); const fats = (weightInKg * 0.8).toFixed(0); const water = (weightInKg * 35 / 1000).toFixed(1); const totalCalories = weightInKg * 33; const proteinCalories = parseFloat(protein) * 4; const fatCalories = parseFloat(fats) * 9; const carbCalories = totalCalories - proteinCalories - fatCalories; const carbs = (carbCalories / 4).toFixed(0); setRecommendations({ protein, fats, carbs, water }); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Sync Your Diet With Your Health Goals.

NutriSync is a modern nutrition tracker tailored for Indian users, helping you log meals, analyze nutrients, and get high-protein food recommendations.

Get Started for Free
{/* Daily Intake Calculator Section */}

Get Your Personalized Daily Intake

setWeight(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g., 70" className="px-4 py-2 w-40 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 rounded-md text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-orange" required />
{recommendations && (

)}

handleCardClick(index)} >
{/* Front Face */}

))}
{/* Educational Section */}

Why Nutrition Matters in India

{/* Protein Gap Card */}

The Protein Gap

Studies show that over 7 out of 10 Indians are protein-deficient. This impacts muscle health, immunity, and energy. NutriSync helps you find and track high-protein foods to bridge this critical gap.

{/* Diabetes Challenge Card */}

The Diabetes Challenge

India has over 100 million people living with diabetes, with a large number remaining undiagnosed. Furthermore, an estimated 136 million people are pre-diabetic. Managing diet is crucial, and our tracker provides the clear insights you need.

{/* Footer Section */}

A small initiative by Shashank Joshi.

); }; export default HomePage;
